page.headline: Checkout built for fast scanning and calm oversight
page.description: Add products quickly, adjust units and discounts, then charge the active site with a compact POS workspace built around daily speed.

checkout.chargeSummaryDescription: Review VAT-inclusive values before finalizing the receipt.
checkout.shortcutsHint: `Alt+P` search, `Alt+C` quantity, `Alt+D` discount, `Alt+U` unit in dialog
checkout.activeSiteHint: The selected site controls sequential numbering and stock validation.
checkout.noSiteWarning: Select an active site before charging so the correct sequential and stock scope are used.
checkout.keyboardHint: Keyboard-first workflow: `F5` catalog, `F1` charge, `Delete` remove current line
checkout.searchHint: Search reuses the existing catalog dialog with unit selection and stock-aware validation.
checkout.adjustHint: Adjust quantities, discounts, and tax-inclusive totals before sending the sale to payment.

cart.empty: Search and add products to start a sale.

history.title: Sales history
history.description: Review recent receipts, payment states, and cashier activity without leaving the POS workspace.
